revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Lists of wars by date | title = [[Lists of wars]] by date | bodyclass = hlist | list1 = *[[List of wars: before 1000|Before 1000]] *[[List of wars: 1000–1499|1000–1499]] *[[List of wars: 1500–1799|1500–1799]] *[[List of wars: 1800–1899|1800–1899]] *[[List of wars: 1900–1944|1900–1944]] *[[List of wars: 1945–1989|1945–1989]] *[[List of wars: 1990–2002|1990–2002]] *[[List of wars: 2003–present|2003–present]] | below = *[[List of conflicts by duration|Longest wars]] *[[List of ongoing armed conflicts|Ongoing military conflicts]] }}<noinclude> {{documentation|content= This template shows articles that are lists of wars by time period.
[[Category:History and events templates by period|Wars by date]] [[Category:List templates by topic|Wars by date]] [[Category:War and conflict navigational boxes]] }} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: more imports
